definitions.text: brukt for å forsterke et bekreftende svar
definitions.translation: used to reinforce an affirmative answer

examples.en: Did I hear right? Yes indeed!

definitions.text: brukt som adverb for å forsterke et utsagn
definitions.translation: used as an adverb to reinforce a statement

examples.no: jo visst skal vi satse på talentene
examples.en: yes indeed, we will invest in the talents
